title: thelypteris finisterrae
intro: Thelypteris finisterrae, also known as the Madeira fern, is a species of fern native to the island of Madeira in the Atlantic Ocean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris finisterrae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice.
